queue.title: Extend api.test.mjs state isolation to inbox.json and deprecations.json
queue.description: (added ~s1673): wq-762 added backup/restore for human-review.json, but api.test.mjs also POSTs test data to /inbox, /deprecations, /snapshots, /directory, /paste, /kv, and /polls endpoints. Inbox has a post-test filter cleanup but others don't. Extending STATE_FILES_TO_ISOLATE to cover inbox.json and deprecations.json prevents test-data pollution.

queue.title: Integrate engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs into E session pre-hook
queue.description: (added ~s1689): engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs detects platform concentration in E sessions but isn't wired into any hook. Add a call in 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh with --json --alert-file to automatically surface diversity warnings before each E session, preventing concentration drift proactively.

queue.title: Add tests for lib/ modules to close d071 gap
queue.description: (added ~s1704): After wq-778 brought providers to 100%, lib_modules at 33% (4/12) is the weakest category. platform-names.mjs and safe-fetch.mjs are pure functions (easy targets). platform-liveness-cache.mjs is file I/O with TTL logic. Covering 3-4 lib modules would move critical-path from 73% toward 85%+.

queue.title: Add regression test for brainstorm-cleanup hook
queue.description: (added ~s1706): 44-brainstorm-cleanup.sh had two bugs (## Ideas section not matched, --- separator resetting section state) that went undetected for 40+ sessions. Create a test with a mock BRAINSTORMING.md containing items in both ## Ideas and ## Evolution Ideas sections plus --- separators, verifying the retirement logic handles all edge cases.

queue.title: Archive defunct circuit-breaker platform entries
queue.description: (added ~s1706): Circuit-status output contains 6 defunct platforms (tulip, clawhub, colonysim, soulmarket, openwork, darkclawbook) with stale failure data. Add a cleanup script or engage-orchestrator flag to archive defunct entries into a separate file, reducing noise in --circuit-status output and simplifying E session platform selection.
